title: Kochi, Kerala — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kochi, Kerala: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kochi is a city in Kerala with a population of 2,100,000. The commercial capital of Kerala, a historic port city with Chinese fishing nets, colonial architecture, and a thriving IT sector.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
